# Blue Bird Call Driver

> Professional 24/7 on-demand call driver service based in Thodupuzha, Kerala, India.

## About
Blue Bird Call Driver is operated by Hridhik, providing professional, vetted drivers for daily, weekly, and monthly hire in Thodupuzha and surrounding areas including Muvattupuzha, Kothamangalam, and Pala.

## Services
- Daily driver hire — on-demand, single day
- Weekly driver package — regular scheduled driving
- Monthly subscription — best value, priority scheduling

## Contact
- Phone: +91 7510306223
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/917510306223
- Email: hridhikhandrik9@gmail.com

## Service Area
Thodupuzha, Muvattupuzha, Kothamangalam, Pala — Kerala, India

## Availability
24 hours a day, 7 days a week

## Pricing
Daily, weekly, and monthly packages available. Contact for quotes. Payments accepted in cash and UPI.
